data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. All 3 commits verified on main (185c1deab415, df74e15fb326, 5797d21b303c). TSC clean, 63/63 doctor tests pass on clean worktree at 5797d21b. Fix correctly: (1) uses global regex to find/collapse duplicate managed guidance blocks, (2) normalizes legacy profile IDs like beads-coarse-human-gated→semiauto bidirectionally, (3) has regression tests for duplicate blocks and legacy alias normalization. No regressions detected.
